did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper is a systematic literature review (SLR) that analyzes existing research on using Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) for dermoscopic pigmented skin lesion classification. It does not use AI/ML itself to obtain new diagnostic or classification results; rather, it synthesizes findings from 54 primary studies that did use these methods.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
